relative_path: Data & Figures/Data/1. t-CycIF/4_10-Expansion_tCycIF/TRIBUS classification for GeoMx/TRIBUS_results.pptx
full_text:
TRIBUS results for Ki67-pRb positive tumors

Tribus runs where done with different logic tables
The Tumor_pRb category was included into the unspecific “Tumor” classification representing the broad population of tumor cells, positive for PanCK
PH3 positive tumor cells were gated with the value 800? Additionally, as the distribution of the signal was very narrow and TRIBUS failed to classify cells based on this marker properly

Logic table 3 -PH3 gate 1000

Marker Stroma Tumor
PanCK_1 -1 1
Vimentin_3 1 0

Marker Tumor Tumor_Ki67 Tumor_Ki67_pRb Tumor_pRb
Ki-67_3 0 1 1 0
pRb_4 0 0 1 1
PH3_2 0 0 0 0
PanCK_1 1 1 1 1

Marker Stroma Tumor

Vimentin_3 1 0

Marker Tumor Tumor_Ki67_pRb Tumor_Ki67 Tumor_pRb

pRb_4 0 1 0 1
PH3_2 0 0 0 0
PanCK_1 1 1 1 1
